generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that mandatory national service has been proven to strengthen national security? Countries with conscription programs report higher levels of public preparedness and stronger deterrence capabilities. It's time we prioritize our collective safety over individual convenience. #NationalSecurity #Conscription
